thought: There are no customer service or order management tools available in this environment. The codebase is a research/ML project with no e-commerce APIs. Without tools to look up Aarav Lee's order, initiate an exchange, process a return, or cancel an order, I cannot complete this customer service task. I should report this clearly.

args.answer: I was unable to complete this task. As Aarav Lee (Phoenix, AZ 85025), I attempted to change the luggage set in my order to a coat, but no customer service or order management tools are available in this environment (the codebase is a research/ML project). To accomplish this task, I would need tools such as: (1) order lookup by customer name/address, (2) item exchange/modification API, (3) return initiation API, and (4) order cancellation API. Without these tools, I cannot look up the order, attempt the exchange to a coat, process a return, or cancel the order if issues arise.
